name: Murray Horwitz
abstract: Murray Horwitz (born September 28, 1949) is an American playwright, lyricist, NPR broadcaster, and arts administrator.

about_quotes.speaker: A.B. Spellman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I heard you and Murray Horwitz on the air... And I’m a huge Cannonball fan so it really caught my attention.
about_quotes.doc_title: A.B. Spellman interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 19, 2022
